metadata_information.title: University-local industry linkages : the case of Tohoku University in the Sendai area of Japan
metadata_information.version: Python script, from D&R API, generated on 2026-03-19

title_statement.title: University-local industry linkages : the case of Tohoku University in the Sendai area of Japan

document_description.abstract: This paper focuses on Tohoku University in Sendai in the nonmetropolitan area of Japan. Both a long historical and comparative perspective and a spacial perspective are essential to discuss the relevance of university-local industry linkages to local regional economic development. The conjunction of these linkages and economic development has been affected by two evolutionary processes: institutional configurations and territorial dynamics in the national innovation system. In addition, university-local industry linkages have been complicated by top-down regionalization and bottom-up regionalism.
